drawing_observation.observation: exact .009 sheet 3 proves D96.9 Q2 and D96.11 CLK2 leave on distinct conductors, but the nearby plain/primed continuation marks cannot be paired uniquely with a sheet-1 endpoint

component_observation.observation: registered component-side package fit fixes both pad identities; visible local top-side copper is partly hidden by D96 and adjacent parts and does not expose a unique remote destination

solder_observation.observation: registered reflected package fit fixes both solder pads; neither pad has a B.Cu departure, so any remote continuation is on F.Cu or changes layer at a separately obscured handoff

non_promotion_basis: the exact drawing keeps the endpoints distinct but does not supply a uniquely pairable sheet-1 identity, while the registered board views exclude a direct B.Cu chase and leave the F.Cu paths obscured; direct continuity is required
